title: astragalus aureus
intro: Astragalus aureus, also known as the yellow milk vetch or golden milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is native to Asia and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, immunomodulatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus aureus include enhancing immune function, reducing inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy for preventing and treating various diseases. Astragalus aureus can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
